faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to play
faq.contact: Still have questions? Talk to your group organizer or contact us by email
faq.q1.a: It's a platform for organizing amateur football matches. You join groups, receive match invitations, and confirm (or decline) your attendance with one click.
faq.q2.q: How do I confirm attendance for a match?
faq.q2.a: You'll receive a match link via WhatsApp or email. Open the link, log in (if not already), and click "I'm playing!" to confirm or "Can't make it" to decline.
faq.q3.q: How do I join a group?
faq.q3.a: There are two ways: (1) via invite — the organizer generates an invite link, you click it and create your account (or log in) to be added automatically; (2) via waitlist — if the group is public and there's an open match, you can apply by clicking "I want to play!" and wait for admin approval.
faq.q4.q: What is a public group and how does it work?
faq.q4.a: Public groups allow any logged-in player to apply for a spot in an open match without needing an invite. When you access the group or match link, you'll see the "I want to play!" button — just click to submit your application. The group admin reviews and approves or rejects it.
faq.q5.q: How do I join a match waitlist?
faq.q5.a: If the group is public and there's an open match with available spots, the "I want to play!" button appears on the group page (Upcoming tab) and on the match page. When you click it, a modal shows the match details (date, location, fees) and a field for a brief introduction to the admin. Check the acceptance checkbox and click "Submit application".
faq.q6.q: Can I join a match without an account?
faq.q6.a: Yes! If you receive a link to a public group match with open spots, you'll see a card with the "Create account and join" button. Click it, fill in your details (name, WhatsApp, password), and after registration the app automatically opens the application modal for that match.
faq.q7.q: How will I know if I was accepted or rejected from the waitlist?
faq.q7.a: You'll receive a push notification as soon as the admin makes a decision. If accepted, you immediately become a group member and your attendance is confirmed automatically. If rejected, you're notified but not added to the group.
faq.q8.q: Can I see my application status?
faq.q8.a: Yes. On the group page (Upcoming tab) or the match page, you'll see the current status: "Awaiting approval" while the application is pending.
faq.q9.q: If I'm accepted from the waitlist, do I need to apply again for future matches?
faq.q9.a: No. Once accepted, you become a permanent group member. In future matches you'll participate normally like any other member — receiving automatic invites if the group uses weekly recurrence.
faq.q10.q: How do I discover matches from other groups with open spots?
faq.q10.a: In the "Discover Matches" section (compass icon in the menu), you can see open matches from public groups with available spots. Filter by date range, court type, or day of the week. Click "I want to play!" to submit your application directly from there. The home screen also highlights up to 3 matches with open spots.
faq.q11.q: How do I see the confirmed players list?
faq.q11.a: On the match page (accessible via the link you received), you'll see the sections "Confirmed", "Declined", and "Pending" with each player's name.
faq.q12.q: How do I share a match with friends?
faq.q12.a: On the match page, scroll to the bottom of the player list. There you'll find two buttons: "Share on WhatsApp" sends a ready-made message with all details (date, location, confirmed players, and link), and "Copy link" copies the match link for you to paste anywhere.
faq.q13.q: How do I create my account?
faq.q13.a: Your account is created automatically when you access a group invite link. Just fill in your name, nickname, and a password. No email required.
faq.q14.q: What does each match status mean?
faq.q14.a: "Open" means you can still confirm or decline attendance. "Closed" means the match has already taken place or was closed by the organizer — responses are no longer accepted.
faq.q15.a: You can check the real-time status at status.rachao.app. If everything is green and the problem persists, wait a few minutes and try again.
faq.q16.q: What if I don't confirm via the link in time?
faq.q16.a: The group organizer can confirm or record your absence directly on the platform, without you needing to access the link. But if possible, please respond via the link — it helps the organizer keep real-time control.
faq.q17.q: How do I install the app on Android?
faq.q17.a: rachao.app can be installed directly on your phone's home screen without needing the Play Store. In the app's side menu, an "Install App" button appears automatically when your browser supports installation. You can also install manually:
faq.q17.s1: Open rachao.app in Chrome or Samsung Internet
faq.q17.s2: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top-right corner of the browser
faq.q17.s3: Tap "Add to home screen" or "Install app"
faq.q18.q: How do I install the app on iPhone or iPad?
faq.q18.a: On iOS, Safari allows you to save the app to your home screen. The process is done manually — the "Install App" button in the app menu also shows these steps:
faq.q18.s1: Open rachao.app in Safari — required, does not work in Chrome or other browsers on iOS
faq.q18.s2: Tap the Share button (box icon with upward arrow, in Safari's bottom bar)
faq.q18.s3: Scroll down the options list and tap "Add to Home Screen"
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1.p1: By creating an account or using rachao.app, you declare that you have read and accept these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
terms.s1.p2: rachao.app is operated by {controller} ("we"), with contact at {email}.
terms.s2.l1: You must provide accurate information when registering (name, nickname, WhatsApp number).
terms.s2.l2: Each WhatsApp number corresponds to a single account.
terms.s2.l3: You are responsible for the security of your password and all activity performed with your account.
terms.s2.l4: Creating accounts on behalf of third parties without authorization is not permitted.
terms.s2.l5: Users under 18 must have consent from a legal guardian.
terms.s3.l1: Organize amateur football groups and matches;
terms.s3.l2: Confirm or decline attendance at matches;
terms.s3.l3: Vote for the best players and track group statistics.
terms.s3.l4: Using the platform for illegal purposes or those that violate third-party rights;
terms.s3.l5: Creating fake accounts, automating actions, or using bots;
terms.s3.l6: Attempting to access other users' or groups' data without authorization;
terms.s3.l7: Sending offensive, discriminatory, or abusive content to other users.
terms.s4.l1: Ensuring the information provided is accurate and up to date;
terms.s4.l2: Using the platform in accordance with these Terms and applicable law;
terms.s4.l3: Any dispute or conflict arising from matches organized through the platform — rachao.app is an organizational tool, not a party to the matches.
terms.s4b.p1: rachao.app provides a financial tracking and recording tool for group admins to monitor payment status (monthly fees or one-time contributions) of members.
terms.s4b.p2: This feature is exclusively an informational record: the platform does not charge, process payments, or intermediate transfers between users.
terms.s4b.p3: Responsibility for billing, collection, and management of agreed amounts between members lies entirely with the group admin and the participants themselves. rachao.app is not responsible for defaults, financial disputes, or any losses arising from unpaid amounts.
terms.s5.p1: To the extent permitted by law, rachao.app is not liable for:
terms.s5.l1: Indirect, incidental damages, or loss of profits;
terms.s5.l3: Conflicts between users arising from organized matches.
terms.s5.p2: The service is provided "as-is", without implied warranties of fitness for a particular purpose.
terms.s6.p1: The brand, logo, design, and source code of rachao.app are the exclusive property of the controller. Use of the platform does not transfer any intellectual property rights to the user.
terms.s6.p2: Data entered by users (names, results, statistics) remains the property of the respective users. By using the platform, you grant rachao.app a non-exclusive license to store and display this data in the context of the service.
terms.s7.p1: You may request deletion of your account at any time through {email}. The account and its data will be removed within the timeframes described in the Privacy Policy.
terms.s7.p2: We may suspend or terminate your account if these Terms are violated, with or without prior notice depending on the severity of the violation.
terms.s8.p1: When we publish a new version of the Terms, you will be notified the next time you access the platform and will need to accept them to continue using it. The date at the top of this document indicates the current version.
terms.s9.p1: These Terms are governed by Brazilian law. The courts of {city} are elected to settle any disputes, to the exclusion of any other, however privileged.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1.p1: rachao.app is a platform for organizing amateur football groups and matches, operated by {controller} ("we", "our", or "controller"), with contact at {email}.
privacy.s2.h: 2. What data we collect and why
privacy.s2.r1.purpose: Account identification, sending verification code during registration
privacy.s2.r3.data: Password (bcrypt hash — never in plain text)
privacy.s2.r6.purpose: Security, fault diagnosis, and abuse prevention
privacy.s2.note: We do not collect sensitive data (health, biometrics, political opinion, ethnicity, religion). We do not sell data to third parties. We do not use data for advertising.
privacy.s3.note: Providers operate as data processors under our instructions and have their own privacy and security policies. Servers may be located outside Brazil; by using the platform, you consent to this international transfer under Art. 33 of the LGPD.
privacy.s4.h: 4. How long we keep your data
privacy.s4.r1.retention: While the account is active; deleted within 30 days of request
privacy.s4.r2.retention: While the group or account exists
privacy.s5.h: 5. Your rights as a data subject
privacy.s5.p1: Under Art. 18 of the LGPD, you have the right to:
privacy.s5.l2: Access the data we hold about you
privacy.s5.l4: Request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention obligations)
privacy.s5.l5: Revoke consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing
privacy.s5.l6: Portability of your data in a structured format (to be implemented)
privacy.s5.l7: File a complaint with the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD) if you believe your rights have been violated
privacy.s5.p2: To exercise any right, send an email to {email} with the subject "Data Rights" and your registered WhatsApp number for identification. We respond within 15 business days.
privacy.s6.p1: We adopt the following security measures:
privacy.s6.l1: Passwords stored exclusively as bcrypt hashes (never in plain text)
privacy.s6.l3: Database access restricted via environment variables and service credentials
privacy.s6.p2: No system is 100% secure. In the event of a security incident affecting your data, we will notify affected users and the ANPD as required by law.
privacy.s7.p1: rachao.app does not use tracking or advertising cookies. We use the browser's localStorage exclusively to store the session authentication token. This data stays only on your device and is removed when you log out.
privacy.s8.p1: When we make relevant changes to this policy, we will update the date at the top of this document. For changes that significantly expand the use of your data, we will notify active users via the platform's communication channel with at least 15 days' notice.
